using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using System.Text;
using System.Threading;

namespace AI.ContextManagement
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Represents a single turn in a conversation history.
    /// </summary>
    public record ChatTurn(string Role, string Text, DateTime Timestamp);

    /// <summary>
    /// A thread-safe cache designed for managing long-context LLM conversations.
    /// Supports summarizing old history to stay within token/character limits.
    /// </summary>
    public class LongContextCache
    {
        private readonly ReaderWriterLockSlim _lock = new ReaderWriterLockSlim();
        private readonly List<ChatTurn> _turns = new List<ChatTurn>();
        
        // Delegate to allow the caller to provide an LLM-based summarization logic
        private readonly Func<string, string, Task<string>>? _summarizer;

        /// <summary>
        /// Initializes a new instance of the <see cref::LongContextCache"/> class.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="summarizer">An optional async function that takes (oldContext, newText) and returns a summary.</param>
        public LongContextCache(Func<string, string, Task<string>>? summarizer = null)
        {
            _summarizer = summarizer;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Adds a new turn to the conversation history.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="role">The role of the speaker (e.g., "user", "assistant", "system").</param>
        /// <param name="text">The content of the message.</param>
        public void AddTurn(string role, string text)
        {
            _lock.EnterWriteLock();
            try
            {
                _turns.Add(new ChatTurn(role, text, DateTime.UtcNow));
            }
            finally
            {
                _lock.ExitWriteLock();
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Compresses the history by summarizing all turns prior to the most recent ones 
        /// into a single "system" or "summary" turn to save space.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="maxChars">The maximum allowed character count for the entire history.</param>
        /// <returns>A task representing the asynchronous compaction operation.</returns>
        public async Task CompactAsync(int maxChars)
        {
            if (_summarizer == null) return;

            string summaryText;
            List<ChatTurn> turnsToSummarize;
            List<ChatTurn> turnsToKeep;

            _lock.EnterWriteLock();
            try
            {
                // If we are already under the limit, do nothing
                if (_turns.Sum(t => t.Text.Length) <= maxChars) return;

                // Identify turns that must be compressed (everything except the most recent)
                // We keep at least the last turn to ensure we don't delete everything.
                int splitIndex = _turns.Count - 1;
                turnsToSummarize = _turns.Take(splitIndex).ToList();
                turnsToKeep = _turns.Skip(splitIndex).ToList();

                string contextToSummarize = string.Join("\n", turnsToSummarize.Select(t => $"{t.Role}: {t.Text}"));
